insight: For a reading-club product (community-led, mentor-led, geographically rooted), invert the standard reading-app hierarchy: do not build AROUND books like Goodreads. Build around community-as-map and people-as-pins. The whole design vocabulary (color, ornament, typography) should be cartographic, not just the map screen. Atlas Obscura is the spiritual sibling, not Literal.club or Storygraph.
